AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="Agreement"> <Value>=Parameters!Agreement.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="FirstVersion"> <Value>=Parameters!FirstVersion.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="SecondVersion"> <Value>=Parameters!SecondVersion.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="IsSalesAgreement"> <Value>=Parameters!IsSalesAgreement.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETG_SalesAgreementVersionCompareDP.ETG_SalesAgreementCompareVersionTmp </CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <rd:DataSetName>ETG_SalesAgreementCompareVersionTmp</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCornerCell> <GroupExpression>=Fields!FieldName.Value</GroupExpression> </GroupExpressions> </Group> <SortExpressions> <SortExpression> <Value>=Fields!FieldName.Value</Value> </SortExpression> </SortExpressions> version</Prompt> </ReportParameter> <ReportParameter Name="IsSalesAgreement"> <DataType>String</DataType> <AllowBlank>true</AllowBlank> <Prompt>Is sales agreement</Prompt> <Hidden>true</Hidden>
